} .single-post-container .alignfull > [class*="__inner-container"], .single-post-container .alignwide > [class*="__inner-container"]{ max-width:718px } .nv-meta-list{ --avatarsize: 20px; } .single .nv-meta-list{ --avatarsize: 20px; } .nv-post-cover{ --height: 250px;--padding:40px 15px;--justify: center; --textalign: center; --valign: center; } .nv-post-cover .nv-title-meta-wrap, .nv-page-title-wrap, .entry-header{ --textalign: center; } .nv-is-boxed.nv-title-meta-wrap{ --padding:40px 15px; --bgcolor: var(--nv-dark-bg); } .nv-overlay{ --opacity: 50; --blendmode: normal; } .nv-is-boxed.nv-comments-wrap{ --padding:20px; } .nv-is-boxed.comment-respond{ --padding:20px; } .single:not(.single-product), .page{ --c-vspace:0 0 0 0;; } .global-styled{ --bgcolor: var(--nv-site-bg); } .header-top{ --rowbcolor: var(--nv-light-bg); --color: var(--nv-text-color); --bgcolor: var(--nv-site-bg); } .header-main{ --rowbcolor: var(--nv-light-bg); --color: var(--nv-text-color); --bgcolor: #ffffff; } .header-bottom{ --rowbcolor: var(--nv-light-bg); --color: var(--nv-text-color); --bgcolor: var(--nv-site-bg); } .header-menu-sidebar-bg{ --justify: flex-start; --textalign: left;--flexg: 1;--wrapdropdownwidth: auto; --color: var(--nv-text-color); --bgcolor: var(--nv-site-bg); } .header-menu-sidebar{ width: 360px; } .builder-item--logo{ --maxwidth: 120px; --fs: 24px;--padding:10px 0;--margin:0; --textalign: left;--justify: flex-start; } .builder-item--nav-icon,.header-menu-sidebar .close-sidebar-panel .navbar-toggle{ --borderradius:0; // Extract PostHog IDs from URL for cross-domain bootstrap (from onboard)
var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var _phDistinctId = urlParams.get('_ph_distinct_id');
var _phSessionId = urlParams.get('_ph_session_id');

var initConfig = {
api_host: 'https://onboard.windsor.ai/ingest',
ui_host: 'https://eu.posthog.com',
defaults: '2025-05-24',
person_profiles: 'identified_only',
cross_subdomain_cookie: true,
cookie_domain: '.windsor.ai',
disable_session_recording: true,
session_recording: {
scriptLoading: 'lazy'
},
autocapture: false,
capture_performance: false
};

if (_phDistinctId && _phSessionId) {
initConfig.bootstrap = {
distinctID: _phDistinctId,
sessionID: _phSessionId
};

if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {
urlParams.delete('_ph_distinct_id');
urlParams.delete('_ph_session_id');
var newUrl = window.location.pathname +
(urlParams.toString() ? '?' + urlParams.toString() : '') +
window.location.hash;
window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, newUrl);
}
}

posthog.init('phc_H5Xl09p6TZRHVBb1sg6ZnGsrQCd2Y85rk6SpPotzznW', initConfig);
['scroll','click','touchstart'].forEach(function(evt) {
document.addEventListener(evt, function() {
if (window.posthog && typeof posthog.startSessionRecording === 'function') {
posthog.startSessionRecording();
}
}, {once: true, passive: true});
});</script> <script type="pmdelayedscript" data-cfasync="false" data-no-optimize="1" data-no-defer="1" data-no-minify="1">function addPostHogTracking() {
if (!window.posthog || typeof window.posthog.get_distinct_id !== 'function') {
setTimeout(addPostHogTracking, 100);
return;
}

const links = document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="onboard.windsor.ai"]');
links.forEach(link => {
if (link.dataset.phTracked) return;
link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
try {
const distinctId = window.posthog.get_distinct_id();
const sessionId = window.posthog.get_session_id();
if (distinctId && sessionId) {
const url = new URL(link.href);
url.searchParams.set('_ph_distinct_id', distinctId);
url.searchParams.set('_ph_session_id', sessionId);
link.href = url.toString();
}
} catch (error) {
console.error('PostHog tracking error:', error);
}
});
link.dataset.phTracked = 'true';
});
}

if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', addPostHogTracking);
} else {
addPostHogTracking();
}

if (window.MutationObserver) {
const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
const hasNewLinks = mutations.some(mutation =>
Array.from(mutation.addedNodes).some(node =>
node.tagName === 'A' || (node.querySelectorAll && node.querySelectorAll('a').length > 0)
)
);
if (hasNewLinks) {
addPostHogTracking();
}
});
observer.observe(document.body, {
childList: true,
subtree: true
});
}</script> <meta name="generator" content="Powered by WPBakery Page Builder - drag and drop page builder for WordPress."><style data-type="vc_custom-css">.user_love p {

.white_text{
color:white;

.grey{

font-size:20px;

}
.button{
background:#B3E2FF;
color:#0E2640;
font-size:20px;
line-height:27px;
border:1px solid #B3E2FF;
border-radius:36px;
font-weight:400;
display:inline-block;
}
.button:hover{
background:#6EC7FF;
border:1px solid #6EC7FF;
color:#0E2640;
font-weight: 500;
}
.button.small{
font-size:16px;
line-height:21px;
background:#b3e2ff73;
border-color:transparent;
}
.button.small:hover{
background:#b3e2ff;
}
.button.transparent{
background:transparent;
border:1px solid #b3e2ff;
}
.button.transparent:hover{
background:transparent;
border:1px solid #6ec7ff;
color:#0E2640;
}
.button.dark{
background:#0E2640;
border:1px solid #0E2640;
color:#ffffff;
}
.button.dark:hover{
background:#7c8795;
border:1px solid #7c8795;
color:#ffffff;
}

.two_buttons p, .one_button p{
display: flex;
gap: 10px;
align-items: center;
}
.two_buttons p .button, .one_button p .button{
width: auto;
padding-left: 40px;
padding-right: 40px;
}
.centered p{
justify-content: center;
margin: auto;
}
.narrow p {
max-width: 280px;
}

}

}

}

}
.destinations .learn_more p>a:hover {

}</style><link rel="icon" href="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/favicon-310-150x150.png" sizes="32x32"><link rel="icon" href="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/favicon-310-300x300.png" sizes="192x192"><link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/favicon-310-300x300.png"><meta name="msapplication-TileImage" content="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/favicon-310-300x300.png"><style>/* CLS desktop fix for full width rows "stretch row" - VC uses JS to adjust css, and JS is defered, so I am front running it trough css with calc(), 2022-04-24 */
@media (min-width:960px){
.vc_row[data-vc-full-width="true"]{
width:100vw; /* 1691px; */
max-width:100vw;
position: relative;
left: calc((100vw - var(--container)) / -2); /* -250.5px; */
box-sizing: border-box;
padding-left: calc((100vw - var(--container)) / 2); /* 250.5px; */
padding-right: calc((100vw - var(--container)) / 2); /* 250.5px; */
}
.vc_row[data-vc-full-width="true"][data-vc-stretch-content="true"]{
padding-left:unset;
padding-right:unset;
}
}</style><style id="wp-custom-css">/*iubenda - hide small button*/
button.iubenda-tp-btn.iubenda-cs-preferences-link[data-tp-float] {
display: none !important;
visibility: hidden !important;
}

/*new menu*/
.menu-item-106314 .sub-menu li img {
width:20px;
height:20px;
object-fit:contain;
}

.sub-menu:has(.menu-item-106315) {
display:grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
}
.nav-ul>li>.sub-menu>li>.wrap>a img, .menu-item-58198 .sub-menu li img{
display:block;
margin-right:10px;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 768px) {
li#menu-item-58192 .sub-menu .sub-menu{
display: block;
}
.nav-ul>li>.sub-menu:before {
content: '';
display: block;
height: 8px;
width: 100%;
position: absolute;
top: -8px;
left: 0px;
}
.nav-ul .sub-menu{
box-shadow:unset;
}
.nav-ul>li {
margin: 0;
padding: 0 calc(var(--spacing) / 2.01);
}
#menu-item--5697239859618712000, #menu-item-106314{
display:block;
}

.menu-item-106321 span.menu-item-title-wrap.dd-title img {
/*margin-top: -21px;*/
}
.nav-ul>li>.sub-menu>li:hover>.wrap>a img{
filter: invert(79%) sepia(46%) saturate(651%) hue-rotate(179deg) brightness(101%) contrast(97%);
}

.nav-ul>li.menu-item-106314>.sub-menu>li:hover>.wrap>a img{
filter:none;
}
.nav-ul>li>.sub-menu {
padding: 23px 13px;
}
.nav-ul .sub-menu li>.wrap{
padding: 10px 8px;
}
.nav-ul>li>.sub-menu>li>.sub-menu>li:hover>.wrap>a{
color: #737374;
}
.nav-ul>li>.sub-menu>li>.wrap>a {
display: inline-flex;
width: 230px;
word-wrap: break-word;
overflow-wrap: break-word;
white-space: normal;
}
.nav-ul>li#menu-item-58192>.sub-menu>li>.wrap>a{
width: 140px;
}
li#menu-item-58192 .sub-menu .caret {
display: none;
}
li#menu-item-58192 .sub-menu .sub-menu {
background: #e8f6ff;
opacity: 1;
left: 200px;
width: calc(100% - 200px - 13px);
top: 13px;
border-radius: 13px;
height: calc(100% - 26px);
padding-top: 24px;
}

li#menu-item-58193 .sub-menu .sub-menu {
background: #e8f6ff;
opacity: 1;
left: 250px;
width: calc(100% - 250px - 13px);
top: 13px;
border-radius: 13px;
height: calc(100% - 26px);
padding-top: 10px;
}
.nav-ul .sub-menu .sub-menu li>.wrap {
padding: 0;
position: absolute;
bottom: 0px;
width: 100%;
}

#menu-item-58192:hover .menu-item-65710 .sub-menu {
visibility: visible;
}
#menu-item-58193:hover .menu-item-58198 .sub-menu {
visibility: visible;
}
.menu-item-58198>.wrap>a{
color: var(--hovercolor, var(--nv-primary-accent));
}
.menu-item-58198>.wrap>a img{
filter: invert(79%) sepia(46%) saturate(651%) hue-rotate(179deg) brightness(101%) contrast(97%);
}
.sub-menu span.caret {
display: none;
}
li#menu-item-64668 .sub-menu li, li#menu-item-79159 .sub-menu li {
width: calc(50% - 13px);
display: inline-block;
}
.menu-item-65710 li#menu-item-99202, .menu-item-65714 li#menu-item-99212, .menu-item-106321 li#menu-item-106326{
position: absolute;
bottom: 15px;
}
.menu-item-65710 li#menu-item-99202 a, .menu-item-65714 li#menu-item-99212 a , .menu-item-106321 li#menu-item-106326 a {
text-align: center;
display: block;
font-size: 14px;
text-decoration:underline;
}
.menu-item-58198 .sub-menu li {
margin-left: 30px;
padding: 10px 0px;
}
.menu-item-58198 li#menu-item-97588 a {
display: block;
font-size: 14px;
text-decoration:underline;
margin-left:30px;
}
.menu-item-58198 .sub-menu li>.wrap{
position:relative !important;
}
.menu-item-65710 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4), .menu-item-65714 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4), .menu-item-106321 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4) {
font-size: 14px;
width: 25%;
float: left;
min-width: unset !important;
height: 84px;
position: relative;
}
.menu-item-65710 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4) a, .menu-item-65714 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4) a, .menu-item-106321 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4) a{
background-size: 50px;
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: top center;
height: 84px;
}
.menu-item-65710 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4) a, .menu-item-65714 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4) a, .menu-item-106321 .sub-menu li:nth-child(-n+4) a{
justify-content: center;
align-items: flex-end;
}
li#menu-item-99203 a{
background-image: url(https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/data-studio-logo.svg);
}
li#menu-item-99204 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/claude-color-1.svg);
}
li#menu-item-99205 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/google-big-query-logo.svg);
}
li#menu-item-99206 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/googlesheets.png);
}
li#menu-item-99208 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/facebook_logo-1.png);
}
li#menu-item-99209 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/google-analics.png);
}
li#menu-item-99210 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/google-Ads.png);
}
li#menu-item-99211 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/salesforce.png);
}

li#menu-item-106329 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/chatgpt_PNG1.png);
}
li#menu-item-106327 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/claude-color-1.svg);
}
li#menu-item-106328 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/gemini-color-1.svg);
}
li#menu-item-106330 a{
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/perplexity-color-1.svg);
}
}
/*new menu end*/











pre{
position: relative;
}
pre .copy-btn {
position: absolute;
right: 2px;
top: 2px;
background: unset;
padding: 3px 10px;
font-size: 14px;
}

/* header new*/
@media only screen and (min-width: 768px) {
ul#nv-primary-navigation-main {
border: 1px solid #CFD4D9;
border-radius: 33px;
position: relative;
}
.nav-ul li{
position: unset;
}
.nav-ul li:hover>.sub-menu{
transition-delay: 0s;
}
.nav-ul>li>.sub-menu{
width:100%;
border-radius:33px;
border: 1px solid #CFD4D9;
top: 53px;
transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0.15s, visibility 0s linear 0.15s;
}
.hfg-slot.left .builder-item.desktop-left {
padding-right: 0px;
}
.builder-item.has-nav{
padding-left:0px;
padding-right:0px;
margin-left: 18px;
}
.login_options{
display:none;
}
.login_options a{
display:block;
border:unset !important;
}
.login_options a:hover{
color:#6ec7ff;
}
.login_section:after {
content: '';
display: block;
height: 8px;
width: 100%;
position: absolute;
top: 46px;
}
.login_section:hover .login_options{
display:block;
position:absolute;
top:53px;
right:0px;
background:white;
width:100%;
border: 1px solid #CFD4D9;
border-radius:32px;
}

.nv-html-content .two_buttons a{
padding: 11px 22px;
font-size:15px;
line-height:24px;
font-weight:600;
min-width: 158px;
border: 1px solid #B3E2FF;
}
.nv-html-content .two_buttons{
display: flex;
gap: 10px;
align-items: center;
}
.nv-html-content .two_buttons .button_menu {
display:flex;
display: flex;
gap: 10px;
align-items: center;
}
.nv-html-content .two_buttons a.login{
background:transparent;
border-color:#0E2640;
display:flex;
align-items: center;
padding: 0 !important;
line-height:28px !important;
max-width: 90px !important;
min-width: 40px;
border:none;
cursor:pointer;
text-decoration: underline;
}
.nv-html-content .two_buttons a.login:hover{
color:#6EC7FF;
}
.nv-html-content .two_buttons a.login img{
width:20px;
height:20px;
margin-right:6px;

}
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 1310px) {
.button_menu a.button.transparent {
display: none;
}
}
/* end header new*/
header.header {
position: fixed;
width: 100%;
z-index: 9999;
}
.neve-main {
margin-top: 103px;
}
.hom2e .neve-main {
margin-top: 63px;
}
.site-logo img{
padding-top: 10px;
padding-bottom: 10px;
}

/* NEW STYLES */
.hide_mob{
display:block;
}
.show_mob{
display:none;
}
a:focus, a:hover {
opacity: 1;
}
.button{
line-height: 27px;
}
.button.trans_white{
background:transparent;
border:1px solid #ffffff;
color:#ffffff !important;
}
.button.trans_white:hover{
background:transparent;
border:1px solid #ffffff;
color:#ffffff;
}
.site-logo a.brand p {
background: rgba(14, 38, 64, 1);
color: white;
font-size: 18px;
line-height:28px;
padding: 11px 22px;
text-align: center;
border-radius: 33px;
}
.button.white{
background:white;
}
#nv-primary-navigation-main>li.menu-item>div>a{
padding-top: 11px;
padding-bottom: 11px;
}
li#menu-item-58197 {

}
li#menu-item-58197 a {
padding: 11px 22px;
border-radius: 30px;
color: rgba(14, 38, 64, 1);
background:rgba(179, 226, 255, 1)
}
li#menu-item-58197 a:hover {
}
.footer-main-inner .row {
grid-template-columns: 6fr 6fr;
}
.footer-main .left .widget_custom_html, .footer-main .c-left .widget_custom_html {
width: 50%;
float: left;
padding-right: 15px;
padding-left: 15px;
}
div#custom_html-15, div#custom_html-16 {
float: left;
padding-right: 15px;
padding-left: 15px;
}
div#cb-row--footer-desktop-bottom,
div#cb-row--footer-mobile-bottom{
display: none;
}
.footer-main-inner .row{
padding-top:50px;
}
.footer-main .hfg-grid.nv-footer-content .builder-item{
padding-right: 0px;
padding-left: 0px;
}
.privac_term a, .copy_r {
color: white !important;
font-weight: 300;
font-size: 18px;
text-decoration:none;
}

.site-footer .widget-area p a{
text-decoration:none;
}
.site-footer .widget-area p a.v_all{
font-weight:500;
text-decoration:underline;
}
.privac_term {
text-align: left;
margin-top:40px;
}
.cta_bot {
display: flex;
gap: 10px;
align-items: center;
max-width: 430px;
}
.cta_bot .button {
width: 100%;
padding-left: 0px;
padding-right: 0px;
}
.soc_bottom {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 8px;
margin-top:63px;
}

.soc_bottom a {
width: 50px;
height: 50px;
display: inline-flex;
padding: 10px;
background: #fff;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
border-radius: 50px;
}

.footer-bottom-inner .row .builder-item:nth-child(2) {
display: none;
}

div#custom_html-15, div#custom_html-16 {
overflow: auto;
min-height: 240px;
padding-top: 20px;
width: 100%;
}
div#custom_html-16 {
padding-top: 60px;
}
.copy_r.medals.hide_mob {
margin-bottom: 40px;
}
.site-footer .widget .button{
color:#0E2640;
}

.right .builder-item.tablet-left.mobile-left{
height:50px !important;
}
button.navbar-toggle:not(.caret-wrap) {
width: 50px;
height: 50px;
padding: 17px;
border-radius: 34px;
}
.site-footer .widget-area p a:hover {
color: rgba(110, 199, 255, 1);
}
.site-footer .widget-area p{ margin-bottom:15px; font-size:18px;font-weight:300;
}
.widget {
margin-bottom: 15px;
}
.copy_r {
/* float: right; */
text-align: right;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 767px) {
.hide_mob{
display:none;
}
.show_mob{
display:block;
}
.copy_r.medals.show_mob, .cta_bot, .soc_bottom, .copy_r , .privac_term{
margin-top: 30px;
text-align: center;
}
.soc_bottom{
margin-top:60px;
justify-content:center;
}
div#custom_html-16{
padding-top:0px;
}
div#custom_html-15, div#custom_html-16{
min-height:60px;
}
}
/* NEW STYLES END */

html{
scroll-padding-top: 80px;
}
a picture {
display: block;
}
.connector-template-default header.heade2r {
position: inherit;
}


site-footer .widget-area a{color:#808188}.bot_logo{margin-left:-10px}
.site-footer .widget .widget-title{font-size: 18px; margin-top: 12px;font-weight: 600;margin-bottom: 20px;}

/*
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {font-family:"Varela Round",Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif }
body {font-family: "Open Sans", Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; }
h2 b {font-size:48px;letter-spacing: .02em;text-transform:uppercase; color: #5778ff;font-weight: 900;line-height:55px;}*/

table{
word-break: break-word;
}
.pic_img{
max-width:200px;
height:auto;
}

.single-connector .nv-sidebar-wrap {
padding: 20px 5px;
}
.single-connector li#block-4 {
list-style: none;
}
.neve-main > .single-post-container .nv-single-post-wrap.col {
padding-top: 16px;
}
img.scaled-image {
border: unset;
margin: 0;
}
.single-post a#default-btn-3 {
display: inline-block;
}
table.dataTable tbody th, table.dataTable tbody td {
padding: 1px 10px;
font-size: 14px;
}
table.dataTable tbody tr{
background-color:unset !important;
}
.vc_general.vc_btn3.vc_btn3-color-blue {
background: unset;
background-color: #5878fc;
color: white;
}
.right .builder-item.tablet-left.mobile-left {
width: 75px;
height: 34px;
}
.single-post .neve-main .button {
margin-top: 15px;
margin-bottom: 30px;
display: inline-block;
}
#serv_status{
max-width:700px;
margin:auto;
margin-bottom:50px;
}
#serv_status .online{
color:green;
}
#serv_status td:last-child{
text-align:right;
}
#serv_status td:first-child:before{
content:'';
height:10px;
width:10px;
border-radius:50%;
background:#00c700;
display:block;
position: relative;
float:left;
margin-right:10px;
margin-top:10px
}
#serv_status .offline{
color:red;
}
#serv_status .offline td:first-child:before{
background:red;
}

.archive.category .posts-wrapper{
margin-top:25px;
}
.archive.category h2.blog-entry-title.entry-title {
font-size: 20px;
}
.bannner{
overflow: auto;
background: #fbf3e8;
border-radius: 20px;
}
.bannner .col-sm-4,.bannner .col-sm-8{
float:left;
padding:10px;
}
.bannner .col-sm-4{
width:40%;
}

.bannner .col-sm-8{
width:60%;
padding: 60px 40px 0px 40px;
}
.bannner a.button {
margin-top: 20px;
display: inline-block;
}

.builder-item--footer_copyright .component-wrap{
display:block;
}
.privac_term {
float: left;
}

#shortcode_posts_filter .vc_row
{
display: flex;
flex-direction: row;
flex-wrap: wrap;
margin-top:30px;
}
#shortcode_posts_filter a.vc_gitem-link {
width: 100% !important;
}
#shortcode_posts_filter .wpb_column.vc_column_container.vc_col-sm-6 {
overflow: hidden;
width:50%;
padding:0 5px;
margin-bottom:10px;
}

#shortcode_posts_filter h2,
#shortcode_posts_filter span {
font-size: 18px;
color: #000000;
/*position: absolute;*/
bottom: 0;
/*width: calc(100% - 30px);*/
background: #ffffff;
padding: 10px;
display:block;
}
.new_filter.wpb_column.vc_column_container.vc_col-sm-12 {
text-align: center;
padding: 30px 0;
}
a.filter_but {
margin: 5px 5px;
padding: 10px;
border: 2px solid #5978fc;
display: inline-block;
border-radius: 30px;
min-width: 55px;
}
#shortcode_posts_filter img {
background-color: white;
border: 2px solid white;
width: 100%;
}
a.filter_but.active,a.filter_but:hover {
color: white;
background: #5978fc;
}
.single-connector .container.single-post-container {
max-width: 1800px;
}
.footer-main-inner {

}
#menu-filter-menu {
border: 2px solid #6a85fd;
padding: 15px 30px;
list-style: none;
border-radius: 30px;
margin: auto;
display: block;
width: fit-content;
background:white;
margin-top:20px;
}

#menu-filter-menu>li{
padding-left: 10px;
padding-right: 10px;
display: inline-block;
margin-top: 0;
position: relative;
}
#menu-filter-menu a{
color:rgb(39, 38, 38);
}

#menu-filter-menu .caret-wrap {
display: inline-block;
margin-left: 4px;
}
#menu-filter-menu .sub-menu .caret-wrap {
display: none;
}
#menu-filter-menu>li ul {
display: none;
}
#menu-filter-menu>li ul>li {
display:block;
}
#menu-filter-menu>li:hover ul {
display: block;
box-shadow: rgba(149,157,165,.2) 0 8px 24px;
position: absolute;
background: white;
z-index: 1;
padding: 10px 20px;
left: 0;
min-width: max-content;
margin-top: 0px;
}
#menu-filter-menu>li:hover>a{
color:rgb(47, 90, 174);
}
#menu-filter-menu .sub-menu>li:hover>a{
color:rgb(47, 90, 174);
}


#menu-filter-menu .caret svg{
fill: currentColor;
width: 0.5em;
height: 0.5em;
}


.win_brings {
padding: 15px;
background: white;
max-width: 1000px;
border-radius: 15px;
box-shadow: rgba(149, 157, 165, 0.2) 0px 8px 24px;
}

#shortcode_posts_filter .vc_gitem-link{
display: inline-block;
}
.author_box{
min-height:200px;
overflow:hidden;
margin-bottom:20px;
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
align-items: center;
background:white;
}
.author_box div{
display:inline-block;
float:left;
}
.author_box div:nth-child(1){
width:200px;
}
.author_box div:nth-child(2){
width:calc(100% - 200px);
min-width:300px;
padding:10px;
}
.author_box h1{
margin-bottom:5px;
font-size:32px;
}
.auth_ava{
border-radius:150px;
height:150px;
width:auto;
margin:0px 25px;
}


table.custom_tabl1 {
font-size: 14px;
border-collapse: collapse;
}


.custom_tabl1 tr:nth-child(1) th:nth-child(1) {
background: #fafafa;
border: unset;
}

table.custom_tabl1 th {
text-align: center;
border-bottom: 2px solid #dadada;
border: 1px solid #fcfdff;
}


table.custom_tabl1 th, table.custom_tabl1 td {
padding: 5px 5px;
white-space: normal;
}
table.custom_tabl_sm th, table.custom_tabl_sm td {
padding: 5px 10px;
white-space: normal;
word-wrap: break-word;
overflow-wrap: break-word;
}

.custom_tabl1 tr:nth-child(1) {
background: #5878fe;
color: white;
}
.custom_tabl1 tr td:nth-child(1) {
background: #5878fe;
color: white;
}
.custom_tabl1 tr td:nth-child(2n+3) {
background: #5878fe0f;
}
.custom_tabl1 .purple{
background: #8339a9 !important;
}


.custom_tabl1 tr:nth-child(1) th:nth-child(1) {
width: 32%; /* Set the width of the first column to 25% */
}

table.custom_tabl1 th {
width: calc(68% / n); /* Set the width of the remaining columns to distribute the remaining 75% evenly */
}


.custom_tabl_sm {
width: 100%; /* Full width of the table */
font-size:16px;
border-collapse: collapse; /* Collapse borders */
}

table.custom_tabl_sm th {
min-width: 14%;
max-width: 20%;
background: #5878fe; /* Color for header row */
color: white; /* Text color for header row */
border-bottom: 2px solid #dadada;
}
table.custom_tabl_sm p{
margin-bottom:0px;
}
table.custom_tabl_sm th, table.custom_tabl_sm .custom_tabl_sm2 td {
min-width: 14%;
max-width: 20%;
padding: 10px 5px;
border: 1px solid #fcfdff;
text-align: center;
}

.custom_tabl_sm tr:nth-child(odd) td {
background: #5878fe0f;
}

.custom_tabl_sm tr:nth-child(even) td {
background: white;
}


#CybotCookiebotDialog.CybotEdge #CybotCookiebotDialogFooter .CybotCookiebotDialogBodyButton{
position: relative;
}

#CookiebotWidget .CookiebotWidget-header .CookiebotWidget-close{
position: relative;
}
/*.footer-main-inner .row{
grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
}
div#custom_html-3, div#custom_html-4 {
width: 50%;
float: left;
}
div#block-2 {
margin-top: 30px;
}
*/
.search-container {
position: relative;
width: 100%; /* Adjust as needed */
margin-top: 30px;
}

.search-input {
width: 100%;
padding: 10px 40px 10px 15px; /* Add space for the icon */
font-size: 16px;
border: 1px solid #ccc;
border-radius: 25px; /* Rounded edges for the input */
outline: none;
transition: border-color 0.3s;
}

.search-input:focus {
border-color: #007BFF; /* Highlight border on focus */
}

.search-icon {
position: absolute;
top: 50%;
right: 15px; /* Align with input padding */
transform: translateY(-50%);
font-size: 18px;
color: #999; /* Icon color */
pointer-events: none; /* Prevent interaction with the icon */
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 767px) {
#shortcode_posts_filter h2,
#shortcode_posts_filter span {
padding: 0px;
}
.single-connector .connector.type-connector {
margin-left: auto;
}
.single-connector .nv-sidebar-wrap.col-sm-12.nv-right.blog-sidebar {
position: unset;
width: auto;
display: block;
}

#menu-filter-menu{
width:100%;
}
#menu-filter-menu>li{
display:block;
}
#menu-filter-menu .caret-wrap {
float: right;
padding: 0 5px;
}
#menu-filter-menu>li:hover ul {
position:inherit;
box-shadow: unset;
}
.vc_row a.button {
display: inline-block;
}
#shortcode_posts_filter .wpb_column.vc_column_container.vc_col-sm-6{
height:auto;
width:100%;
}
#shortcode_posts_filter h2 {
position: inherit;
width:auto;
}
h1.vc_custom_heading {
font-size: 36px !important;
padding: unset !important;
padding-bottom: 20px !important;
}
h2.vc_custom_heading {
font-size: 28px !important;
padding: unset !important;
padding-bottom: 10px !important;
}
.vc_gitem-zone .wpb_single_image .vc_figure{
max-width:unset !Important;
}
#CybotCookiebotDialogFooter #CybotCookiebotDialogBodyButtonsWrapper{
flex-direction: row-reverse !important;
}
#CybotCookiebotDialogFooter .CybotCookiebotDialogBodyButton{
padding: 0.5em 0.1em !important;
font-size: 12px !important;
}
#CybotCookiebotDialogFooter #CybotCookiebotDialogBodyLevelButtonCustomize .CybotCookiebotDialogArrow{
margin-left: 0.5em !important;
}
div#custom_html-3, div#custom_html-4, div#custom_html-12, div#custom_html-14 {
width: 100%;
}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 600px) {
article.connector_old {
background-image: url(/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/user_l_us_hp-e1672167606177.png.webp);
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: right top;
background-size:200px;
}
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
.privac_term {
float: unset;
}

.copy_r {
float: unset;
}
.bannner .col-sm-4,.bannner .col-sm-8{
width:100%;
padding:10px;
}
}
/**
* Use the :target pseudo-element to apply
* styles to the element with the same ID as
* the fragment identifier.
* (e.g. `#target-section`)
*
* The pseudo-element can also be used in
* conjunction with another selector to
* define a variety of target styles.
* (e.g. `#target-section:target)
*/

:target {
-webkit-animation: target-fade 1s;
-moz-animation: target-fade 1s;
-o-animation: target-fade 1s;
animation: target-fade 1s;
}


/**
* Keyframe animation definition
*
* 1. Insert a color of your choice here
*/

@-webkit-keyframes target-fade {
from { background-color: #5778ff; } /* [1] */
to { background-color: transparent; }
}

@-moz-keyframes target-fade {
from { background-color: #5778ff; } /* [1] */
to { background-color: transparent; }
}

@-o-keyframes target-fade {
from { background-color: #5778ff; } /* [1] */
to { background-color: transparent; }
}

@keyframes target-fade {
from { background-color: #5778ff; } /* [1] */
to { background-color: transparent; }
}</style><noscript><style>.wpb_animate_when_almost_visible { opacity: 1; }</style></noscript><style>.perfmatters-lazy-video{position:relative;width:100%;max-width:100%;height:0;padding-bottom:56.23%;overflow:hidden}.perfmatters-lazy-video img{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;left:0;display:block;width:100%;height:100%;max-width:none;margin:0;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:.5s all;-webkit-transition:.5s all;-moz-transition:.5s all}.perfmatters-lazy-video img:hover{-webkit-filter:brightness(75%)}.perfmatters-lazy-video .play{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;right:auto;width:68px;height:48px;margin-left:-34px;margin-top:-24px;background:url(https://windsor.ai/wp-content/plugins/perfmatters/img/youtube.svg) no-repeat;background-position:center;background-size:cover;pointer-events:none;filter:grayscale(1)}.perfmatters-lazy-video:hover .play{filter:grayscale(0)}.perfmatters-lazy-video iframe{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:99}</style></head><body class="home wp-singular page-template page-template-page-templates page-template-template-home page-template-page-templatestemplate-home-php page page-id-57728 wp-custom-logo wp-theme-neve wp-child-theme-neve-child-master nv-blog-grid nv-sidebar-full-width nv-without-title menu_sidebar_slide_left wpb-js-composer js-comp-ver-8.7.2 vc_responsive" id="neve_body">

visibility: visible; }.is-menu-sidebar.menu_sidebar_slide_left .header-menu-sidebar { transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0); left: 0; }.is-menu-sidebar.menu_sidebar_slide_right .header-menu-sidebar { transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0); right: 0; }.is-menu-sidebar.menu_sidebar_pull_right .header-menu-sidebar, .is-menu-sidebar.menu_sidebar_pull_left .header-menu-sidebar { transform: translateX(0); }.is-menu-sidebar.menu_sidebar_dropdown .header-menu-sidebar { height: auto; }.is-menu-sidebar.menu_sidebar_dropdown .header-menu-sidebar-inner { max-height: 400px; padding: 20px 0; }.is-menu-sidebar.menu_sidebar_full_canvas .header-menu-sidebar { opacity: 1; }.header-menu-sidebar .menu-item-nav-search:not(.floating) { pointer-events: none; }.header-menu-sidebar .menu-item-nav-search .is-menu-sidebar { pointer-events: unset; }.nav-ul li:focus-within .wrap.active + .sub-menu { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; }.nav-ul li.neve-mega-menu:focus-within .wrap.active + .sub-menu { display: grid; }.nav-ul li > .wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; position: relative; padding: 0 4px; }.nav-ul:not(.menu-mobile):not(.neve-mega-menu) > li > .wrap > a { padding-top: 1px }</style><style>.header-menu-sidebar .nav-ul li .wrap { padding: 0 4px; }.header-menu-sidebar .nav-ul li .wrap a { flex-grow: 1; display: flex; }.header-menu-sidebar .nav-ul li .wrap a .dd-title { width: var(--wrapdropdownwidth); }.header-menu-sidebar .nav-ul li .wrap button { border: 0; z-index: 1; background: 0; }.header-menu-sidebar .nav-ul li:not([class*=block]):not(.menu-item-has-children) > .wrap > a { padding-right: calc(1em + (18px*2)); text-wrap: wrap; white-space: normal;}.header-menu-sidebar .nav-ul li.menu-item-has-children:not([class*=block]) > .wrap > a { margin-right: calc(-1em - (18px*2)); padding-right: 46px;}</style><main id="content" class="neve-main" role="main"><style>.home .accordion_with_image {
padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3.796vw + 0.741rem, 4.063rem);
border-radius: 32px;
background-color: rgba(179, 226, 255, 0.26)
}

.home .accordion_with_image .row {
align-items: center;
}

.home .accordion_with_image .accordion-image.active,
.home .accordion_with_image .accordion-image-wrapper,
.accordion-content-img.text img {
padding-right: 0;
background-color: transparent !important;
}

.home .accordion_with_image .accordion-image img,
.home .accordion_with_image .mob_version img {
border-radius: 36px;
}



.home .button.small {
background-color: #B3E2FF;
max-width: 250px;
font-weight: 500;
}

/* Tabs section - last */

.home .tabs_main_container {
margin-left: calc(-50vw + 50%);
margin-right: calc(-50vw + 50%);
width: 100vw;
background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image.jpg');
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: center center;
background-size: cover;
padding: clamp(30px, 2.215vw + 22.46px, 65.01px);
}

.home .tab_main_content {
max-width: 1300px;
margin: 0 auto;
background: #fff;
padding: 30px 15px;
border-radius: 32px;
}

.home .tab_item_image .tab_item_image_wrapper {
display: flex;
padding: 0;
border-radius: 0;
box-shadow: unset;
margin: 0;
height: 100%;
}

.home .tab_item_image .tab_item_image_wrapper img {
object-fit: contain;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tab_item_text li {
margin-bottom: 0;
font-size: 18px;

}

.home .tabs_main_container blockquote {
background-color: rgba(207, 212, 217, 0.21);
padding: 15px 30px;
text-align: center;
border-radius: 12px;
border: none;
font-size: 20px;
margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tabs {
width: max-content;
color: #fff;
min-height: 72px;
margin-left: auto;
margin-right: auto;
padding-left: 5px;
padding-right: 5px;
margin-top: 0;
border: 1px solid #fff;
border-radius: 50px;
padding-bottom: 5px;
padding-top: 5px;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tab_item {
margin-top: 0;
font-size: 18px;
color: #fff;
text-align: center;
padding: 12px 35px;
min-width: 200px;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tab_item.active {
color: #0E2640;
padding: 12px 35px;
background-color: #B3E2FF;
border-radius: 30px;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tab-content.hide {
display: none !important;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tab-content.show {
display: flex !important;
min-height: 555px;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tab_item.active::after {
display: none;
}

.home .tabs_main_content {
margin-left: auto;
margin-right: auto;
max-width: 790px;
color: #fff;
}

.home .tabs_main_content h2 {
text-align: center;
font-size: 32px;
}

.home .tab-content .text a {
text-decoration: none;
font-weight: 600;
}

.home .tab-content .text .btn-try {
position: relative;
display: flex;
justify-content: flex-end;
}

.home .tab-content .text .btn-try:after {
content: url('/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Vector-19.svg');
display: flex;
align-items: center;
margin-left: 10px;
vertical-align: middle;
}


.home .tab_main_content .col-7,
.home .tab_main_content .col-5 {
flex: 0 0 50%;
max-width: 50%;
}

.home .guide_cards .cards_container {
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
}

.home .guide_cards .guide_card {
background-color: #fff;
border: 1px solid #CFD4D9;
align-items: flex-start;
justify-content: unset;
}

.home .guide_cards .guide_card h3 {
font-size: 24px;
}

.home .guide_cards .guide_card p {
color: #575757;
font-weight: 400;
}


.home .guide_cards .image_card_wrapper {
background-color: rgba(179, 226, 255, 0.38);
}

.home .data_integ_group {
background-color: rgba(14, 38, 64, 0.03);
border-radius: 32px;
flex-direction: row-reverse;
margin: 0;
padding: clamp(1.875rem, 1.899vw + 1.472rem, 3.75rem) clamp(1.25rem, 0.633vw + 1.116rem, 1.875rem)0 clamp(1.25rem, 0.633vw + 1.116rem, 1.875rem);
}

.home .data_integ_group .col-6:has(div)> :first-of-type {
padding-left: 20px;
color: #0E2640;
}

.home .data_integ_group .col-6:has(img) {
align-self: flex-end;
}



.home .data_integ_group .col-6:has(div):first-of-type {
padding-bottom: 25px;
}

.home .data_integ_group .big-number {
font-size: 70px;
font-weight: 700;
display: block;
line-height: 100%;
padding-top: 15px;
}

.home .data_integ_group img {
padding: 20px 20px 0 25px;
border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0;
display: block;
background-color: #fff;
}

.home .guide_cards {
margin-top: 40px;
}

.home .growth-driving .title {
max-width: 780px;
}

.home .growth-driving .title h2 {
margin-bottom: 64px;
}

.review-top-section {
width: 100%;
padding: 0 0 60px;
}

.review-top-container {

display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
align-items: flex-start;
gap: 60px;
}


.review-top-left {
flex: 0 1 45%;
}

.review-top-btn {
max-width: 250px;
justify-content: center;
}


.review-top-right {
flex: 0 1 48%;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: flex-start;
}

.review-top-right p {
color: #575757;
margin: 0 0 32px 0;
}

.home .list_block .learn_more {
margin-top: 20px;
}


.home .list_block img {
background-color: #0E26400D;
box-shadow: none;
}

.home .list_block h3+span {
font-size: 16px;
font-weight: 400;
color: rgb(14, 38, 64);
margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.home .list_block h3 {
font-size: 20px;
font-weight: 500;
margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.home .list_block .button.small:hover {
background: #6EC7FF;

}

.home .destinations h2 {
font-size: 20px;
font-weight: 500;
margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.home .information_cards .information_card {
gap: 30px;
}

.home .information_cards .information_card p {
font-size: 20px;
}

.home .accordion-item-img:first-child {
padding-top: 0;
}

.home .accordion-item-img:nth-child(1)>.accordion-header-img::after {
display: none;
}

.home .accordion-item-img:nth-child(1)>.accordion-header-img h3 {
margin-bottom: 0;
}

.home .tab_main_content .tab_item_text .text {
align-items: flex-start;
}

@media (max-width: 991px) {


.review-top-left,
.review-top-right {
flex: 0 0 100%;
max-width: 100%;
}

.review-top-left h2 {
font-size: 36px;
}
}

@media screen and (max-width:780px) {

.home .tab_main_content .col-7,
.home .tab_main_content .col-5 {
flex: 0 0 100%;
max-width: 100%;
}


}

@media screen and (max-width:768px) {

.home .tabs_main_container .tab-content {
flex-direction: column-reverse;
}

.home .tab_item_image .tab_item_image_wrapper {
margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.home .data_integ_group .big-number {
text-align: center !important;
}

.home .data_integ_group .col-6:has(div):first-of-type {
padding-bottom: 25px;
}

.home .data_integ_group .col-6:has(div)> :first-of-type {
padding-left: 0;
}

.home .growth-driving .title h2 {
margin-bottom: 32px;
}
}



@media screen and (max-width:576px) {

.home .bottom_hero_cta .two_buttons .button {
width: 100%;
flex-direction: column;
}

.home .bottom_hero_cta .two_buttons {
flex-direction: column;
}

.home .v5-tab-trigger {
width: 100%;
text-align: center;
}

.home .tabs_main_content h2 {
font-size: 22px;
}

.home .tab_main_content,
.home .tabs_wrapper,
.home .tabs_main_container .tabs {
display: flex !important;
visibility: visible !important;

}

.home .tabs_main_container {
padding: 30px 15px;
}

.home .tab_content_mobile {
display: none !important;
}

.home .tabs_main_container .tabs {
flex-direction: column;
width: 100%;
max-width: 100%;
margin-left: 0;
margin-right: 0;
border: none;
}

.home .tabs_main_container blockquote {
padding: 10px 20px;
}

.home .tabs_main_container blockquote p {
line-height: 1.4;
}

.home .tab-content .text .btn-try {
justify-content: center;
}

.home .tab_main_content {
padding: 15px 0;
}
}

/* end Tabs section - last */</style><div class="container single-page-container"><div class="row home"><div class="nv-single-page-wrap"><div class="nv-content-wrap entry-content"><div class="row"><div class="col-12 col-sm-12"><style>/* Animation */
.hero-viewport {
width: 100%;
overflow: hidden;
position: relative;
}


.film-strip {
display: flex;
width: calc((var(--n) + 1) * 100%);
height: 100%;
animation: jump-infinite calc(var(--n) * var(--speed)) steps(var(--n)) infinite;
}

.frame {
width: calc(100% / (var(--n) + 1));
height: 100%;
}

.frame img {
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
object-fit: cover;
display: block;
}

@keyframes jump-infinite {
0% {
transform: translateX(0);
}

100% {
transform: translateX(calc(-100% * var(--n) / (var(--n) + 1)));
}
}

/* end Anim */


.hero_block {
justify-content: space-between;
padding-top: 20px;
}

.hero_block h1 {
font-weight: 500;
text-wrap: balance;
}

.hero_block p strong {
color: #575757;

}

.hero_block .button.transparent {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 8px;
justify-content: center;
}

.hero_block p:has(strong) {
max-width: 550px;
}

.hero_block .check_boxes {
display: inline-flex;
row-gap: 10px;
column-gap: 40px;
}

.anim-col {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
}

.hero_block .check_full {
display: block;
}

.hero_block .check_small {
display: inline-flex;
}

.hero_block .check_boxes span {
font-size: 18px;
line-height: 30px;
display: inline-flex;
gap: 10px;
margin-bottom: 14px;
align-items: flex-start;
}

.check_boxes img {
max-width: 30px;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 768px) and (min-width: 576px) {
.hero_block .col_image {
margin-top: 30px;

}
}

@media screen and (max-width: 768px) {

.check_boxes {
flex-wrap: wrap;
margin-top: 30px;
}

.hero_block .two_buttons,
.hero_block .one_button {
flex-wrap: wrap;
}
}</style><div class="row hero_block"><div class="col-6 col-md-12"><div class="m_w_630 m_lr_initial"><h1>Connect any data source. Analyze it anywhere. Get insights with AI.</h1><div class="grey p"><p>Automatically pull data from 350+ business platforms and send it to your BI tools, spreadsheets, warehouses, and AI chats with the Windsor.ai connectors.</p><p><strong class="mob_hidden">Forget CSVs. Stop copy/paste. Sync data in 1 minute. No code required.</strong></p></div><div class="two_buttons_auto_width m_top_48 m_lr_initial">
<a class="button" href="https://onboard.windsor.ai/" target="_blank">Start for Free</a>
<a class="button transparent" href="https://onboard.windsor.ai/auth0/login/google-oauth2" target="_blank"><img width="27" height="27" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;27&#039;%20height=&#039;27&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%2027%2027&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" xyz alt="google icon" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/google-logo.png" />Sign up with Google</a></div><div class="check_boxes m_top_48 check_small">
<span><img width="30" height="30" src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/check-mark.svg">Free forever plan</span>
<span><img width="30" height="30" src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/check-mark.svg">No credit card needed</span></div></div></div><div class="col-5 col-md-12 "><div class="col_image"><div class="hero-viewport"><div class="film-strip" style="--n: 4; --speed: 2s;"><div class="frame">
<img width="1626" height="1626" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1626&#039;%20height=&#039;1626&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201626%201626&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Windsor.ai Home" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Group-78.jpg" /></div><div class="frame">
<img width="1626" height="1626" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1626&#039;%20height=&#039;1626&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201626%201626&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Windsor.ai Home" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Hero-visual-MCP-1.jpg" /></div><div class="frame">
<img width="1626" height="1626" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1626&#039;%20height=&#039;1626&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201626%201626&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Windsor.ai Home" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Hero-visual-MCP.jpg" /></div><div class="frame">
<img width="1626" height="1626" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1626&#039;%20height=&#039;1626&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201626%201626&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Windsor.ai Home" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Hero-visual-MCP-2.jpg" /></div><div class="frame">
<img width="1626" height="1626" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1626&#039;%20height=&#039;1626&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201626%201626&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Group-78.jpg" /></div></div></div></div></div></div><style>/* CSS LOGOS ANIMATION */

@-webkit-keyframes scroll {
0% {
transform: translateX(0);
}

100% {
transform: translateX(-50%);
}
}

@keyframes scroll {
0% {
transform: translateX(0);
}

100% {
/* scroll only 50% */
transform: translateX(-50%);
}
}

.logos {
margin: auto;
overflow: visible;
position: relative;
width: auto;
margin-top: 49px;
}


.logo_items {
-webkit-animation: scroll 45s linear infinite;
animation: scroll 45s linear infinite;
display: flex;
width: fit-content;
}

.logo_item {

width: 200px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
}

.logos:hover .logo_items {
animation-play-state: paused;
}


/* END CSS LOGOS ANIMATION */


.integration_logos {
width: 100vw;
position: relative;
left: 50%;
margin-left: -50vw;
background-color: #CFD4D91F;
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
margin-right: -50vw;
}

.integration_logos_wrapper {
max-width: var(--container);
width: 100%;
padding: 46px 15px;
text-align: center;
}

.integration_logos_title {
font-weight: 600;
}

@media (max-width: 576px) {
.integration_logos_title {
font-size: 16px;
}
}</style><div class="row"><div class="integration_logos m_top_cl-90"><div class="integration_logos_wrapper ">

<img width="1000" height="1000" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1000&#039;%20height=&#039;1000&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201000%201000&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/chatgpt_PNG1.png" /><h3 class="f_20_500">ChatGPT</h3>
<a class="button small" href="https://onboard.windsor.ai/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Free</a><div>
<a class="learn_more grey f_16_500" href="https://windsor.ai/destinations/chatgpt/">Learn more</a></div></div></div><div class="grey-border list_block"><div>
<img width="1200" height="1641" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1200&#039;%20height=&#039;1641&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201200%201641&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Google_Sheets_logo_2014-2020.svg.png" /><h3 class="f_20_500">Google Sheets</h3>

<a class="learn_more grey f_16_500" href="https://windsor.ai/destinations/google-sheets/">Learn more</a></div></div></div><div class="grey-border list_block"><div>
<img width="750" height="663" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;750&#039;%20height=&#039;663&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20750%20663&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/bigquery-logo-.png" /><h3 class="f_20_500">Google BigQuery</h3>
<a class="button small" href="https://onboard.windsor.ai/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Free</a><div>
<a class="learn_more grey f_16_500" href="https://windsor.ai/destinations/google-bigquery/">Learn more</a></div></div></div></div><div class="m_top_30 m_w_250"><a class="button dark" id="show-more" href="/destinations/">View all destinations</a></div></div><div class="m_top_120"><style>.mcp-feature {
position: relative;
border-radius: 32px;
background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/background-mcp-feature.png');
object-fit: cover;
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-size: cover;
}

.new-lab {
color: #fff;
padding: 10px 30px;
background-color: #6EC7FF;
border-radius: 30px;
position: absolute;
text-align: center;
font-weight: 600;
font-size: 24px;
top: -25px;
left: 40px;
}

.mcp-feature__title {
font-size: 36px;
}

.mcp-feature__container {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 0.6fr 1fr;
align-items: center;
}

.mcp-feature__right {
padding: 30px;
padding-left: 0;
}

.mcp-feature__left {
height: 100%;
display: flex;

}

.mcp-feature__left img {
max-width: 100%;
height: 100%;
object-fit: contain;

}

.mcp-feature__placeholder {
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
}

.btn-wrap {
display: flex;
justify-content: flex-end;
}

.mcp-feature__btn {
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
text-decoration: none;
font-weight: 600;
color: #0E2640;
text-decoration: underline;
transition: all 0.2s;
}

.mcp-feature__btn .arrow {
margin-left: 8px;
}

.llm-compatibility {
margin-top: 32px;
}

.llm-compatibility__title {
font-size: 20px;
margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.llm-compatibility__list {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 12px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
}


.llm-compatibility__item img {
width: 30px;
height: 30px;
}

.llm-compatibility__item a {
position: relative;
padding: 15px;
border: 1px solid transparent;
border-radius: 50%;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
background-color: #fff;
transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.llm-compatibility__item a:hover {
border: 1px solid #6EC7FF;
}

.llm-compatibility__more {
padding: 8px 12px;
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.37);
border-radius: 12px;
font-size: 18px;
font-weight: 500;
}

.install-block {
margin-top: 32px;
}

.install-block__title {
font-size: 20px;
margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.install-block__list {
display: flex;
gap: 16px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.install-card {
text-decoration: none;
background: #FFFFFF;
border: 1px solid transparent;
border-radius: 100px;
padding: 12px 20px;
max-width: max-content;
transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
}

.install-card:hover {
border: 1px solid #6EC7FF;
}

.install-card__content {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 12px;
}

.install-card__icon {
width: 24px;
height: 24px;
object-fit: contain;
}

.install-card__text {
font-size: 20px;
color: #0e2640;
font-weight: 600;
}

.install-card__arrow {
color: #71b7fb;
transition: transform 0.2s ease;
}

.install-card:hover .install-card__arrow {
transform: translateX(4px);
}

@media (max-width:991) {
.mcp-feature__container {
grid-template-columns: 0.7fr 1fr;
}
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
.btn-wrap {
justify-content: center;
}

.mcp-feature {
padding-bottom: 40px;
}

.mcp-feature__right {
padding: 20px;
}

.mcp-feature__container {
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}

.mcp-feature__left {
min-height: 200px;
}
}

@media screen and (max-width: 560px) {
.mcp-feature {
background-position: center;
}

.install-card__arrow {
display: none;
}

.new-lab {
text-align: center;
left: 20px;
font-size: 20px;
right: 20px;
}
}</style><section class="mcp-feature">
<span class="new-lab">NEW: Windsor MCP for AI Insights</span><div class="mcp-feature__container"><div class="mcp-feature__left">
<img width="1566" height="1677" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1566&#039;%20height=&#039;1677&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201566%201677&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Group-3465500-1.png" /></div><div class="mcp-feature__right"><h2 class="mcp-feature__title">Ask AI anything about your data &mdash; directly in Claude &amp; ChatGPT, and other LLMs</h2><p class="mcp-feature__text">
Connect your Windsor.ai data to your favorite AI tool and get answers in seconds, from cross-channel campaign analysis to performance dashboards.
<a href="https://windsor.ai/destinations/windsor-mcp-for-ai-insights/" class="mcp-feature__btn" target="_blank">
Learn more. </a></p><div class="install-block"><h3 class="install-block__title">Install with one click:</h3><div class="install-block__list">
<a href="https://claude.ai/directory/360c0c31-4bb6-42ca-8e50-5da0a100a68e" class="install-card" target="_blank"><div class="install-card__content">

<span class="install-card__text">Native connector for Claude</span>
<svg class="install-card__arrow" width="21" height="11" viewbox="0 0 21 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div>
</a>

<span class="install-card__text">Native app for ChatGPT</span>

</svg></div>
</a></div></div><div class="llm-compatibility"><h3 class="llm-compatibility__title">Also works with:</h3><div class="llm-compatibility__list"><div class="llm-compatibility__item">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Copilot" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/microsoft-copilot-1.svg" />

</a></div><div class="llm-compatibility__more">
other LLMs</div></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="m_top_120"><div class="v5-main-container" id="v5_instant_tabs_6a43e7f21c18a"><div class="v5-box-bg"></div><div class="v5-inner-content"><div class="v5-header-box"><h2>Centralize your data and make it ready for AI-powered analytics, dashboards, and reports. Always fresh, unified, and accessible to your team and clients</h2></div><div class="v5-tabs-nav-wrapper"><ul class="v5-tabs-list"><li class="v5-tab-trigger v5-is-active" data-idx="0">
