<img width="1064" height="600" class="skip-lazy" src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/windsor-supported-destinations.png" alt="windsor supported destinations" /></div><div class="v5-slide-item " data-idx="2">
<img width="1064" height="600" class="skip-lazy" src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/build-pipelines-with-windsor.jpg" alt /></div><div class="v5-slide-item " data-idx="3">
<img width="1064" height="600" class="skip-lazy" src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/create-a-destination-task-in-windsor.jpg" alt /></div><div class="v5-slide-item " data-idx="4">
<img width="1064" height="600" class="skip-lazy" src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ai-insights-with-windsor-mcp.jpg" alt="ask ai about your data windsor" /></div></div><div class="v5-nav-arrows">
<button class="v5-arrow v5-prev" type="button"><svg width="12" height="21" viewbox="0 0 12 21" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M10.707 20.3535L0.707031 10.3535L10.707 0.353516" stroke="#0E2640"></path>
</svg>
</button>
<button class="v5-arrow v5-next" type="button"><svg width="12" height="21" viewbox="0 0 12 21" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M0.353516 0.353516L10.3535 10.3535L0.353516 20.3535" stroke="#0E2640"></path>
</svg>
</button></div></div></div></div><style>.v5-main-container {
position: relative;
padding: 64px 24px 0;
color: #ffffff;
}

.v5-box-bg {
position: absolute;
top: 0;
left: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 70%;
background-color: #0E2640;
border-radius: 32px;
z-index: 1;
}

.v5-main-container .v5-header-box {
margin-bottom: 64px;
}

.v5-inner-content {
position: relative;
z-index: 2;
}

.v5-header-box h2 {
text-align: center;
font-size: 32px;
max-width: 880px;
margin: 0 auto;
}

.v5-header-box p {
text-align: center;
color: #94a3b8;
max-width: 750px;
margin: 0 auto 50px;
}

.v5-main-container .v5-tabs-list {
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
gap: 12px;
list-style: none;
padding: 0;
margin-top: 0;
margin-bottom: 64px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.v5-tab-trigger {
padding: 12px 24px;
border-radius: 100px;
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
cursor: pointer;
font-weight: 500;
transition: 0.2s;
}

.v5-tab-trigger.v5-is-active {
background: #B3E2FF;
color: #0d1b2a;
}

.v5-content-outer {
position: relative;
max-width: 1100px;
margin: 0 auto;
}

.v5-slide-item {
display: none;
width: 100%;
aspect-ratio: 1.71875;
background-color: #fff;
border-radius: 32px;
}

.v5-slide-item.v5-active {
display: block;
}

.v5-slide-item img {
width: 100%;
height: auto;
display: block;
border-radius: 24px;
}

.v5-nav-arrows {
position: absolute;
top: calc(50% - 60px);
width: 112%;
left: -6%;
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
transform: translateY(-50%);
pointer-events: none;
z-index: 10;
}

.v5-arrow {
pointer-events: auto;
width: 48px;
height: 48px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: rgba(179, 226, 255, 0.54);
border: none;
color: #fff;
font-size: 32px;
padding: 0;
cursor: pointer;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
.v5-header-box h2 {
font-size: 22px;
text-align: left;
}

.v5-nav-arrows {
display: none;
}

.v5-main-container {
padding: 44px 24px 0;
}
}


@media (max-width: 480px) {
.v5-box-bg {
height: 87%;
border-radius: 24px;
}

.v5-main-container .v5-tabs-list {
margin-bottom: 30px;
font-size: 18px;
}
}</style> <script>(function() {
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
const root = document.getElementById('v5_instant_tabs_6a43e7f21c18a');
if (!root) return;

const tabs = root.querySelectorAll('.v5-tab-trigger');
const slides = root.querySelectorAll('.v5-slide-item');
const nextBtn = root.querySelector('.v5-next');
const prevBtn = root.querySelector('.v5-prev');

let currentIndex = 0;
const total = slides.length;

function update(index) {
if (index >= total) index = 0;
if (index < 0) index = total - 1;
currentIndex = index;

slides.forEach((s, i) => s.classList.toggle('v5-active', i === currentIndex));
tabs.forEach((t, i) => t.classList.toggle('v5-is-active', i === currentIndex));
}

tabs.forEach((tab, i) => {
tab.addEventListener('click', () => update(i));
});

if (nextBtn) nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => update(currentIndex + 1));
if (prevBtn) prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => update(currentIndex - 1));
});
})();</script> </div><style>.information_cards .cards_container {
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(205px, 1fr));
gap: 16px;
display: grid;
}

.information_cards .information_cards_wrapper h2 {

margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.information_cards .information_card {
color: #fff;
background-color: #0e2640;
padding: 24px;
gap: 20px;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
border-radius: 32px;
}


.information_cards .information_card p {
margin-bottom: 0;
}


.information_cards .image_card_wrapper {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
width: 65px;
height: 65px;
padding: 14px;
background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
border-radius: 16px;
}

.information_cards .information_card h4 {
margin-bottom: 0;
}</style><div class="information_cards m_top_cl-90"><div class="information_cards_wrapper"><div class="information_cards_content"></div><div class="cards_container"><div class="information_card"><div class="image_card_wrapper">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/square-code-1.svg" /></div><div class="f_18"><p>Build AI integrations and end-to-end ETL/ELT pipelines in minutes with <span style="color: #b3e2ff;">no coding skills</span></p></div></div><div class="information_card"><div class="image_card_wrapper">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/customize-1.svg" /></div><div class="f_18"><p>Automate reporting and reduce manual data prep tasks to <span style="color: #b3e2ff;">save 4+ hours every day</span></p></div></div><div class="information_card"><div class="image_card_wrapper">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/galaxy-star-1.svg" /></div><div class="f_18"><p>Get started and explore the platform&rsquo;s features with a <span style="color: #b3e2ff;">free plan</span></p></div></div><div class="information_card"><div class="image_card_wrapper">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/icon.svg" /></div><div class="f_18"><p>Start instantly with a vast library of <span style="color: #b3e2ff;">free, customizable dashboard templates</span></p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="m_top_120"><style>.accordion-item-img {
padding: 26px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(14, 38, 64, 0.2);
}

.accordion-item-img:last-child {
border-bottom: unset;
padding-bottom: 0;
}


.accordion-header-img {
cursor: pointer;
padding: 0 clamp(2.5rem, 2.407vw + 1.019rem, 3.125rem);
}

.accordion-header-img .count {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
color: #fff;
background-color: rgba(14, 38, 64, 0.8);
border-radius: 33px;
width: 33px;
height: 33px;
position: absolute;
top: 0;
left: -10px;
}

.accordion-item-img.expanded .accordion-header-img .count {
background-color: #0E2640;
}

.accordion-header-img h3 {
margin-bottom: 0;
}

.accordion-header-img {
margin-bottom: 0px;
font-size: 22px;
position: relative;
line-height: 36px;
}

.accordion-header-img:after {
content: '';
display: block;
width: 36px;
height: 36px;
background: url('/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/arrow-down.svg');
background-position: center;
background-repeat: no-repeat;
position: absolute;
right: -10px;
top: 0;
}

.collapsed .accordion-header-img:after {
transform: rotate(0);
}

.expanded .accordion-header-img:after {
transform: rotate(180deg);
}

.accordion-content-img {
display: none;
}

.accordion-content-img ul {
padding-left: 20px;
}

.accordion-content-img ul {
list-style-type: disc;
}

.accordion-content-img ol {
list-style-type: decimal;
}

.accordion-content-img ul,
.accordion-content-img ol {
font-size: 20px;
line-height: 30px;
}

.accordion-content-img ul li {
margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.accordion-image-wrapper {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
height: 100%;
width: 100%;
padding: 25px;
}

.accordion-content-img.text {
padding: 0 clamp(2.5rem, 2.407vw + 1.019rem, 3.125rem);
}

.accordion-content-img.text img {
width: 625px;
height: auto;
max-width: 100%;
background-color: #fff;
border-radius: 16px;
padding: 10px;
}

.accordion-content-img.text p {
font-size: 20px;
line-height: 30px;
margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.accordion-content-img.text a {
color: var(--nv-text-color);
}

.accordion-content-img.text p:not(:has(+ *)) {
margin-bottom: 0;

}

.accordion-item-img.expanded .accordion-content-img {
display: block;
}

.accordion-item-img .accordion-header-img h3 {
font-size: 24px;
font-weight: 400;
line-height: 38px;
}



.accordion-item-img.expanded .accordion-header-img h3 {
margin-bottom: 20px;

}

.accordion_with_image .accordion_with_img_title {
max-width: 900px;
text-wrap: balance;

}

.accordion_with_image .accordion_with_img_subtitle {
padding: 24px;
border-radius: 32px;
border: 1px solid #fff;
margin-bottom: 48px;

}

.accordion_with_image .accordion_with_img_subtitle h4 {

font-weight: 500;
}

.accordion_with_image .accordion_with_img_subtitle ol,
.accordion_with_image .accordion_with_img_subtitle ul {
margin-bottom: 0;
}

.accordion_with_image .accordion-image,
.accordion_with_image .accordion-image img {
width: 100%;
}

.accordion_with_image .accordion-image {
display: none;
}

.accordion_with_image .accordion-image.active {
display: block;
padding: 25px;
background-color: #fff;
border-radius: 16px;
}

.accordion_with_image .mob_version {
display: none;
overflow: hidden;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
.accordion_with_image .desktop_version {
display: none;
overflow: hidden;
}

.accordion_with_image .accordion-image-wrapper.mob_version {
display: block;
overflow: visible;
background-color: #fff;
border-radius: 16px;
}

.accordion_with_image .accordion-image-wrapper.mob_version img {
width: 100%;
}

.accordion_with_image .mob_version .accordion-content-img.text {
padding: 0 0;
}

.accordion_with_image .accordion_with_img_title {
line-height: 44px;
}
}

@media (max-width:475px) {
.accordion-content-img.text {
padding: 0 0;
}

.accordion-image-wrapper {
padding: 10px;
}
}</style> <script>document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
document.querySelectorAll('.accordion-header-img').forEach((header, index) => {
header.addEventListener('click', function(e) {

const accordionItem = this.parentElement;
const allAccordionItems = document.querySelectorAll('.accordion-item-img');
const allAccordionItemsImage = document.querySelectorAll('.accordion-image');

allAccordionItemsImage.forEach((i, index) => {

if (i.classList.contains('active')) {
i.classList.remove('active');
}
});

if (accordionItem?.id === allAccordionItemsImage[index]?.id) {
allAccordionItemsImage[index].classList.add("active")
}

// Close all items first
allAccordionItems.forEach((i, index) => {

i.classList.remove('expanded');
i.classList.add('collapsed');
});


// Expand the clicked item
if (!accordionItem.classList.contains('expanded')) {
accordionItem.classList.add('expanded');
accordionItem.classList.remove('collapsed');
}
});
});
});</script> <div class="accordion_with_image "><h2 class="accordion_with_img_title">Get started with Windsor.ai connectors in under 60 seconds</h2><div class="row"><div class="col-6 col-md-12"><div id="1" class="accordion-item-img expanded"><div class="accordion-header-img">
<span class="count">1</span><h3>Sign up and start for free</h3></div><div class="accordion-content-img text"><p class="p"></p><p><a href="https://onboard.windsor.ai/">Create your windsor.ai account</a> and explore the platform&rsquo;s capabilities at no cost.</p><div class="accordion-image-wrapper mob_version">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Img-9.svg" /></div></div></div><div id="2" class="accordion-item-img collapsed"><div class="accordion-header-img">
<span class="count">2</span><h3>Connect all your data sources</h3></div><div class="accordion-content-img text"><p class="p"></p><p>Aggregate data from more than 350+ sources with our secure and reliable ELT connectors.</p><div class="accordion-image-wrapper mob_version">
<img width="1626" height="1626" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1626&#039;%20height=&#039;1626&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201626%201626&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Img-22-1.png" /></div></div></div><div id="3" class="accordion-item-img collapsed"><div class="accordion-header-img">
<span class="count">3</span><h3>Choose where to send your data</h3></div><div class="accordion-content-img text"><p class="p"></p><p>Transfer your unified data to the preferred destination: AI chat, BI tool, database, warehouse, or spreadsheet.</p><div class="accordion-image-wrapper mob_version">
<img width="813" height="809" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;813&#039;%20height=&#039;809&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20813%20809&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="send data with windsor ai" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/send-data-with-windsor-ai.png" /></div></div></div><div id="4" class="accordion-item-img collapsed"><div class="accordion-header-img">
<span class="count">4</span><h3>Bonus: Analyze your data faster with AI</h3></div><div class="accordion-content-img text"><p class="p"></p><p>Connect your data to ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI chats to unlock deeper insights and create visual summaries in seconds.</p><div class="accordion-image-wrapper mob_version">
<img width="1626" height="1626" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1626&#039;%20height=&#039;1626&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201626%201626&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Img-25.png" /></div></div></div></div><div class="col-6 col-md-12 desktop_version"><div class="accordion-image-wrapper"><div id="1" class="accordion-image active">
<img width="460" height="260" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;460&#039;%20height=&#039;260&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20460%20260&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Img-9.svg" /></div><div id="2" class="accordion-image ">
<img width="460" height="260" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;460&#039;%20height=&#039;260&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20460%20260&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Img-22-1.png" /></div><div id="3" class="accordion-image ">
<img width="460" height="260" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;460&#039;%20height=&#039;260&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20460%20260&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="send data with windsor ai" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/send-data-with-windsor-ai.png" /></div><div id="4" class="accordion-image ">
<img width="460" height="260" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;460&#039;%20height=&#039;260&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20460%20260&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Img-25.png" /></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="m_top_120"><style>.grid-container {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 300px 1fr;
gap: 40px;
align-items: start;
}


.awards-sidebar {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 20px;
}

.awards-card {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
background: rgba(14, 38, 64, 0.04);
padding: 40px 20px;
border-radius: 20px;
}



.awards-card .stars {
align-self: center;
}

.awards-card .awards-list {
list-style: none;
color: #0E2640;
padding: 0;
margin-bottom: 0;
margin-top: 0;

}

.awards-card .awards-list li {
margin-top: 20px;
line-height: 28px;
}

.awards-list li::before {
content: "\2022";
color: #2b3b4a;
font-weight: bold;
display: inline-block;
width: 1em;
}

.awards-badges {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
gap: 15px;
}

.awards-badges img {
height: auto;
}


.reviews-masonry {
column-gap: 20px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
display: flex;
}

.review-card {
break-inside: avoid;
background: #f1f8fe;
border-radius: 24px;
padding: 30px;
margin-bottom: 20px;
border: none;
}

.review-card:nth-child(1),
.review-card:nth-child(4) {
flex: 0 0 calc(60% - 10px);
}

.review-card:nth-child(2),
.review-card:nth-child(3) {
flex: 0 0 calc(40% - 10px);
}

.review-user {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 12px;
margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.user-avatar {
width: 48px;
height: 48px;
border-radius: 50%;
object-fit: cover;
}

.user-name {
display: block;
font-weight: 600;
color: #0E2640;
}

.review-date {
font-size: 16px;
color: #0E2640;
}

.review-content {
font-size: 18px;
color: #0E2640;
}

.review-content p {
margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.awards-header {
display: flex;
gap: 14px;
align-items: center;
}

.awards-header h3 {
margin-bottom: 0;
}

.awards-header img {
width: 40px;
height: 40px;
flex: 0 0 auto;
}


.review-top-section {
width: 100%;
padding: 0 0 60px;
}

.review-top-container {

display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
align-items: flex-start;
gap: 60px;
}


.review-top-left {
flex: 0 1 45%;
}

.review-top-btn {
max-width: 250px;
font-weight: 500;
}


.review-top-right {
flex: 0 1 48%;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: flex-start;
}

.review-top-right p {
color: #575757;
margin: 0 0 32px 0;
}

.des-hidden {
display: none;
}

@media (max-width: 1024px) {
.reviews-masonry {
column-count: 1;
}

.review-card:nth-child(1),
.review-card:nth-child(4) {
flex: 0 0 100%;
}

.review-card:nth-child(2),
.review-card:nth-child(3) {
flex: 0 0 100%;
}

}

@media (max-width: 991px) {
.review-top-container {
flex-direction: column;
gap: 0;

}


}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
.grid-container {
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}

.review-top-section {
padding: 0 0 40px;
}

.des-hidden {
display: flex;
margin-top: 40px;
}

.laptop-hidden {
display: none;
}

.reviews-awards-block .d-flex {
justify-content: center;
display: flex;
}

.awards-card .awards-list li {
font-size: 18px;
}
}</style><div><section class="review-top-section"><div class="review-top-container"><div class="review-top-left"><h2>What clients say about Windsor.ai</h2></div><div class="review-top-right"><p>Over 300,000 data professionals worldwide trust Windsor.ai, and their testimonials highlight our platform&rsquo;s effectiveness and reliability.</p>
<a href="https://windsor.ai/customer-reviews/" class="review-top-btn button laptop-hidden" target="_blank">
See all reviews </a></div></div></section><section class="reviews-awards-block"><div class="inner-content grid-container"><div class="awards-sidebar"><div class="awards-header">
<img width="104" height="108" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;104&#039;%20height=&#039;108&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20104%20108&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="G2" class="main-logo perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/g2-seeklogo.png" /><h3>Reviews &amp; awards</h3></div><div class="awards-card"><div class="stars">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="star-1" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/star.svg" />
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="star-2" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/star.svg" />
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="star-3" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/star.svg" />
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="star-4" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/star.svg" />
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="star-5" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/star.svg" /></div><ul class="awards-list"><li>Great customer support</li><li>Powerful integrations</li><li>Vast connector library</li><li>Ease of use</li><li>Affordable pricing</li></ul></div><div class="awards-badges">
<a href="https://www.g2.com/products/windsor-ai/reviews" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<img width="116" height="150" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;116&#039;%20height=&#039;150&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20116%20150&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Badge" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/users-love-us.png" />
</a><a href="https://www.g2.com/products/windsor-ai/reviews" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<img width="116" height="150" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;116&#039;%20height=&#039;150&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20116%20150&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="Badge" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/fastes-medal.svg" />
</a></div></div><div class="reviews-masonry"><div class="review-card"><div class="review-user">
<img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;100&#039;%20height=&#039;100&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20100%20100&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="user-avatar perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Roberto-Fernandes-1.png" /><div class="user-info">
<span class="user-name">Roberto Fernandes</span>
<span class="review-date">6 month ago</span></div></div><div class="review-content"><p><strong>Efficient tool. Fast support.</strong></p><p>Windsor.ai is now a crucial tool in our day-to-day operations. We integrate data from various media channels with BigQuery quickly and transparently and have never had any type of instability. Every time we needed support, they were quick and resolved all cases.</p></div></div><div class="review-card"><div class="review-user">
<img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;100&#039;%20height=&#039;100&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20100%20100&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="user-avatar perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Kelly-Hatherell.png" /><div class="user-info">
<span class="user-name">Kelly Hatherell</span>
<span class="review-date">2 week ago</span></div></div><div class="review-content"><p><strong>The backbone of cross-channel reporting.</strong></p><p>Windsor.ai is easy to use and delivers all the data I need for full funnel marketing. I have been using this tool for close on 2 years and their product development is good.</p></div></div><div class="review-card"><div class="review-user">
<img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;100&#039;%20height=&#039;100&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20100%20100&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="user-avatar perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Andreas-Waldmann.png" /><div class="user-info">
<span class="user-name">Andreas Waldmann</span>
<span class="review-date">6 month ago</span></div></div><div class="review-content"><p><strong>Found hidden ROI, saved $2.8M.</strong></p><p>Windsor.ai transformed how we understand marketing performance. Multi-touch attribution showed us that channels we thought weren&rsquo;t working were actually driving our most valuable customers. This insight alone saved us $2.8M annually and helped us scale our loan business more efficiently than ever.</p></div></div><div class="review-card"><div class="review-user">
<img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;100&#039;%20height=&#039;100&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20100%20100&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="user-avatar perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Maxime-Morell.png" /><div class="user-info">
<span class="user-name">Maxime Morell</span>
<span class="review-date">2 week ago</span></div></div><div class="review-content"><p><strong>Excellent tool for Amazon data integration.</strong></p><p>Windsor has been a game-changer for our data analysis. We&rsquo;ve been using it for several months to extract sales data from our Amazon account, and it seamlessly integrates with Looker Studio to create accurate and detailed dashboards. The setup was straightforward, and the data is reliable. It has saved us a significant amount of time and effort in manually compiling reports.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="d-flex">
<a href="https://windsor.ai/customer-reviews/" class="review-top-btn button des-hidden" target="_blank">
See all reviews </a></div></section></div></div><style>.tabs_main_container {
margin-top: clamp(5.25rem, 3.333vw + 4.583rem, 7.5rem);
overflow: hidden;
}

.tabs_main_content {
margin-bottom: 64px;
}

.tabs_main_content p:last-child {
margin-bottom: 0;
}

.tabs_wrapper {
overflow-x: auto;
margin-bottom: 36px;
}

.tabs_main_container .tabs {
display: flex;
position: relative;
justify-content: space-between;
gap: 20px;
padding-bottom: 16px;
border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(207, 212, 217, 0.5);
list-style-type: none;
}



.tab_main_content .tab_item_text .text {
height: 100%;
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
flex-direction: column;
}


.tabs_main_container .tabs .tab_item {
text-wrap: nowrap;
}


.tabs_main_container .tabs li {
color: #737374;
cursor: pointer;
}

.tabs_main_container .tab_item_text ul,
.tab_content_mobile .text ul {
list-style-type: disc;
}

.tabs_main_container .tab_item_text ol,
.tab_content_mobile .text ol {
list-style-type: decimal;
}

.tabs_main_container .tab_item_text ul,
.tabs_main_container .tab_item_text ol,
.tab_content_mobile .text ul,
.tab_content_mobile .text ol {
font-size: 20px;
line-height: 30px;
padding-left: 20px;
}

.tabs_main_container .tab_item_text ul li,
.tab_content_mobile .text ul li,
.tab_content_mobile .text ol li,
.tabs_main_container .tab_item_text ol li {
margin-bottom: 20px;
}


.tab_item_image .tab_item_image_wrapper {
border-radius: 32px;
overflow: hidden;
padding: 25px;
margin: 10px;
box-shadow: 0px 2px 13.6px 0px #0E264021;
}

.tab_content_mobile {
display: none;
visibility: hidden;
}


@media (max-width: 576px) {
.tab_main_content {
display: none !important;
visibility: hidden !important;
}

.tab_content_mobile {
display: block;
visibility: visible;
}

.tab_content_mobile .card:last-child {
margin-bottom: 0;
}

.tab_content_mobile .card {
background: rgba(14, 38, 64, 0.02);
border-radius: 32px;
padding: 36px;
margin-bottom: 20px;
}


.tab_content_mobile .card_image_wrapper {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 20px;
margin-bottom: 36px;
max-width: 150px;
}

.tab_content_mobile .card_image_wrapper .item_image {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
width: 80px;
height: 80px;
background-color: rgba(179, 226, 255, 0.49);
border-radius: 16px;
flex: 0 0 auto;
}


.tabs_main_container .tabs {
display: none !important;
visibility: hidden !important;
}

.tabs_wrapper {
display: none !important;
visibility: hidden !important;
}
}

/* SHOW / HIDE TABS */
.tabs_main_container .hide {
display: none;
}

.tabs_main_container .show {
display: flex;
}

.tabs_main_container .tab_item {
position: relative;
}

.tabs_main_container .tab_item.active::after {
content: '';
background-color: #B3E2FF;
position: absolute;
width: 100%;
height: 2px;
bottom: -18px;
left: 0;
}

.tabs_main_container .tab_item.active {
color: #0E2640;
}

/* END SHOW/HIDE TABS */</style> <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

let tab = document.querySelectorAll('.tabs_main_container .tab_item'),
header = document.querySelector('.tabs_main_container .tabs'),
tabContent = document.querySelectorAll('.tabs_main_container .tab-content');

tab[0].classList.add('active');

function hideTabContent(a) {
for (let i = a; i < tabContent.length; i++) {
tabContent[i].classList.remove('show');
tabContent[i].classList.add('hide');
}
}

hideTabContent(1);

function showTabContent(b) {
if (tabContent[b].classList.contains('hide')) {
tabContent[b].classList.remove('hide');
tabContent[b].classList.add('show');
}
}


header.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
let target = event.target;

if (target && target.classList.contains('tab_item')) {

tab.forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));

target.classList.add('active');

for (let i = 0; i < tab.length; i++) {

if (target == tab[i]) {
hideTabContent(0);
showTabContent(i);
break;
}
}
}
});
});</script> <div class="tabs_main_container"><div class="tabs_main_content m_w_840"><h2>A modern data platform for AI analytics and automated data workflows</h2></div><div class="tabs_wrapper"><ul class="tabs f_20_600"><li class="tab_item">
Analysts</li><li class="tab_item">
Agencies</li><li class="tab_item">
Data teams</li></ul></div><div class="tab_main_content row tab-content"><div class="col-7 col-md-12 col-sm-12 tab_item_text p"><div class="text"><div><h3>Windsor.ai for analysts</h3><ul><li>Automate data collection and reporting across 350+ channels</li><li>Build pipelines and prepare datasets without custom API scripts or manual exports</li><li>Use pre-built dashboard templates for instant reporting</li><li>Reduce dependency on engineering for new integrations</li><li>Identify trends and unlock deep insights in seconds with AI</li></ul><blockquote><p>&#9201; Save up to 40 hours per week on manual data wrangling and prep</p></blockquote><p style="text-align: right;"><a class="btn-try" href="/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Now</a></p></div></div></div><div class="col-5 col-md-12 col-sm-12 tab_item_image"><div class="tab_item_image_wrapper"><img width="945" height="765" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;945&#039;%20height=&#039;765&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20945%20765&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/windsor.ai-for-analysts.jpg" /></div></div></div><div class="tab_main_content row tab-content"><div class="col-7 col-md-12 col-sm-12 tab_item_text p"><div class="text"><div><h3>Windsor.ai for agencies</h3><ul><li>Automate cross-platform client dashboards and reporting</li><li>Manage reporting on hundreds of accounts from a single workspace</li><li>Get access to unlimited users and data blending on every plan</li><li>Scale to more sources, accounts, and clients without added maintenance</li><li>Onboard new clients in minutes instead of days</li></ul><blockquote><p>&#128200; Scale to 3x more clients without adding technical headcount</p></blockquote><p style="text-align: right;"><a class="btn-try" href="/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Now</a></p></div></div></div><div class="col-5 col-md-12 col-sm-12 tab_item_image"><div class="tab_item_image_wrapper"><img width="945" height="759" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;945&#039;%20height=&#039;759&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20945%20759&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/windsor.ai-for-agencies.jpg" /></div></div></div><div class="tab_main_content row tab-content"><div class="col-7 col-md-12 col-sm-12 tab_item_text p"><div class="text"><div><h3>Windsor.ai for data teams</h3><ul><li>Replace fragile scripts with fully managed, automated pipelines</li><li>Normalize and transform datasets at scale with no manual effort</li><li>Send analysis-ready data to warehouses, BI tools, and LLMs via no-code connectors</li><li>Keep dashboards and models up to date with scheduled auto-refreshes</li></ul><blockquote><p>&#129489;&zwj;&#128187; Eliminate over 80% of custom scripts and manual maintenance</p></blockquote><p style="text-align: right;"><a class="btn-try" href="/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Now</a></p></div></div></div><div class="col-5 col-md-12 col-sm-12 tab_item_image"><div class="tab_item_image_wrapper"><img width="945" height="773" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;945&#039;%20height=&#039;773&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%20945%20773&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/windsor-for-data-teams.jpg" /></div></div></div><div class="tab_content_mobile row "><div class="col-12"><div class="card"><div class="card_image_wrapper"><div class="item_image_text f_20_600 ">
Analysts</div></div><div class="text p"><h3>Windsor.ai for analysts</h3><ul><li>Automate data collection and reporting across 350+ channels</li><li>Build pipelines and prepare datasets without custom API scripts or manual exports</li><li>Use pre-built dashboard templates for instant reporting</li><li>Reduce dependency on engineering for new integrations</li><li>Identify trends and unlock deep insights in seconds with AI</li></ul><blockquote><p>&#9201; Save up to 40 hours per week on manual data wrangling and prep</p></blockquote><p style="text-align: right;"><a class="btn-try" href="/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Now</a></p></div></div></div><div class="col-12"><div class="card"><div class="card_image_wrapper"><div class="item_image_text f_20_600 ">
Agencies</div></div><div class="text p"><h3>Windsor.ai for agencies</h3><ul><li>Automate cross-platform client dashboards and reporting</li><li>Manage reporting on hundreds of accounts from a single workspace</li><li>Get access to unlimited users and data blending on every plan</li><li>Scale to more sources, accounts, and clients without added maintenance</li><li>Onboard new clients in minutes instead of days</li></ul><blockquote><p>&#128200; Scale to 3x more clients without adding technical headcount</p></blockquote><p style="text-align: right;"><a class="btn-try" href="/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Now</a></p></div></div></div><div class="col-12"><div class="card"><div class="card_image_wrapper"><div class="item_image_text f_20_600 ">
Data teams</div></div><div class="text p"><h3>Windsor.ai for data teams</h3><ul><li>Replace fragile scripts with fully managed, automated pipelines</li><li>Normalize and transform datasets at scale with no manual effort</li><li>Send analysis-ready data to warehouses, BI tools, and LLMs via no-code connectors</li><li>Keep dashboards and models up to date with scheduled auto-refreshes</li></ul><blockquote><p>&#129489;&zwj;&#128187; Eliminate over 80% of custom scripts and manual maintenance</p></blockquote><p style="text-align: right;"><a class="btn-try" href="/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Try It Now</a></p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="growth-driving"><div class="how_to_conn row m_top_120"><div class="col-12 col-sm-12"><div class="title"><h2>Turn raw data into insights: quick, AI-driven, fully automated</h2></div><div class="grey"></div></div></div><style>.data_integ_group img {
padding: 40px 20px;
border-radius: 32px;
box-shadow: 0px 2px 13.6px 0px #B3B3B340;
}

.data_integ_group p {
margin-bottom: 20px;
}</style><div class="row data_integ_group align_center m_top_120"><div class="col-6 col-md-12"><h2></h2><div class="grey "><p><strong>Connect, unify, and analyze all your data in one place.</strong></p><p>Windsor.ai automates cross-platform data integration with a no-code ETL/ELT platform that handles schema mapping, updates, and near real-time syncs.</p><p>Gain a single source of truth for all your marketing and business performance and connect your data to AI chats for deeper insights, <strong>saving weekly</strong></p><p><span class="big-number" style="text-align: right;">40+ hrs</span></p></div></div><div class="col-6 col-md-12 text_center">
<img width="1154" height="756" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;1154&#039;%20height=&#039;756&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%201154%20756&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="cross-channel analysis windsor" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/cross-channel-analysis-windsor.jpg" /></div></div><style>.guide_cards .cards_container {
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(235px, 1fr));
gap: 16px;
display: grid;
}

.guide_cards .guide_cards_wrapper h2 {
margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.guide_cards .guide_card {
color: #fff;
background-color: rgba(179, 226, 255, 0.18);
padding: 24px;
gap: 20px;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
border-radius: 32px;
}

.guide_cards .guide_card .button {
background-color: #6EC7FF;
padding: 12px;
max-width: 160px;
}




.guide_cards .guide_card p {
margin-bottom: 0;
font-size: 20px;
}


.guide_cards .image_card_wrapper {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
width: 65px;
height: 65px;
padding: 14px;
background-color: #fff;
border-radius: 16px;
}

.guide_cards .guide_card h4 {
margin-bottom: 0;
}

.guide_card .button {
color: #fff;
}

.guide_cards_content p {
max-width: 700px;
}</style><div class="guide_cards m_top_cl-90"><div class="guide_cards_wrapper"><div class="guide_cards_content"></div><div class="cards_container"><div class="guide_card"><div class="image_card_wrapper">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/analyse-alt-1.svg" /></div><div class="f_18_500 darkblue"><h3>Bring all your data together</h3><p>Easily blend data from multiple sources and make it available where your team needs it, be it Looker Studio, Claude, BigQuery, Power BI, Sheets, or another destination.</p></div></div><div class="guide_card"><div class="image_card_wrapper">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/clock-up-arrow-1.svg" /></div><div class="f_18_500 darkblue"><h3>Automate data workflows</h3><p>Streamline recurring tasks and eliminate manual data wrangling by replacing scripts, file exports, and spreadsheet copy-pasting with fully automated data movement.</p></div></div><div class="guide_card"><div class="image_card_wrapper">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Vector.svg" /></div><div class="f_18_500 darkblue"><h3>Optimize strategy and budget</h3><p>Get a unified view of performance across all channels, spot top campaigns and underperforming spend, and reallocate budget based on real data, not guesswork.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row"><div class="bottom_hero_cta m_top_100 m_bot_100"><div class="align_center custom-col"><div class="column_text"><div><h2>Turn your data into a strategic asset. <strong>Get instant insights</strong> across all your platforms with Windsor.ai</h2><div class="grey subtitle p">
One connection, endless possibilities. Centralize your data and instantly fuel your AI assistants, BI dashboards, and custom reports.</div><div class="two_buttons m_lr_initial">
<a class="button" href="https://onboard.windsor.ai/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Start for Free </a>
<a class="button transparent" href="https://calendly.com/windsorai/guided-onboarding" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Book a Demo</a></div></div></div><div class="column_img"><div class="main"><div class="circle"><div class="icon-block">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="g logo" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/g-logo.svg" /></div><div class="icon-block">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="fb logo" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/fb-logo.svg" /></div><div class="icon-block">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="big query data" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/google-big-query-logo.svg" /></div><div class="icon-block">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="youtube logo" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/youtube-log.svg" /></div><div class="icon-block">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=&#039;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#039;%20width=&#039;0&#039;%20height=&#039;0&#039;%20viewBox=&#039;0%200%200%200&#039;%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="power logo" class="perfmatters-lazy" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/power-logo.svg" /></div><div class="icon-block">

//# sourceURL=wp-i18n-js-after</script> <script id="neve-script-js-extra">var NeveProperties = {"ajaxurl":"https://windsor.ai/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php","nonce":"2c27646c56","isRTL":"","isCustomize":"","infScroll":"enabled","maxPages":"0","endpoint":"https://windsor.ai/wp-json/nv/v1/posts/page/","query":"[]","lang":"en_US"};
//# sourceURL=neve-script-js-extra</script> <script src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/themes/neve/assets/js/build/modern/frontend.js" id="neve-script-js" async></script> <script id="neve-script-js-after">var html = document.documentElement;
var theme = html.getAttribute('data-neve-theme') || 'light';
var variants = {"logo":{"light":{"src":false,"srcset":false,"sizes":false},"dark":{"src":"https:\/\/windsor.ai\/wp-content\/uploads\/2024\/08\/windsor.ai-logo.png","srcset":false,"sizes":"(max-width: 200px) 100vw, 200px"},"same":true}};

function setCurrentTheme( theme ) {
var pictures = document.getElementsByClassName( 'neve-site-logo' );
for(var i = 0; i<pictures.length; i++) {
var picture = pictures.item(i);
if( ! picture ) {
continue;
};
var fileExt = picture.src.slice((Math.max(0, picture.src.lastIndexOf(".")) || Infinity) + 1);
if ( fileExt === 'svg' ) {
picture.removeAttribute('width');
picture.removeAttribute('height');
picture.style = 'width: var(--maxwidth)';
}
var compId = picture.getAttribute('data-variant');
if ( compId && variants[compId] ) {
var isConditional = variants[compId]['same'];
if ( theme === 'light' || isConditional || variants[compId]['dark']['src'] === false ) {
picture.src = variants[compId]['light']['src'];
picture.srcset = variants[compId]['light']['srcset'] || '';
picture.sizes = variants[compId]['light']['sizes'];
continue;
};
picture.src = variants[compId]['dark']['src'];
picture.srcset = variants[compId]['dark']['srcset'] || '';
picture.sizes = variants[compId]['dark']['sizes'];
};
};
};

var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
if (mutation.type == 'attributes') {
theme = html.getAttribute('data-neve-theme');
setCurrentTheme(theme);
};
});
});

observer.observe(html, {
attributes: true
});
function toggleAriaClick() { function toggleAriaExpanded(toggle = 'true') { document.querySelectorAll('button.navbar-toggle').forEach(function(el) { if ( el.classList.contains('caret-wrap') ) { return; } el.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true' === el.getAttribute('aria-expanded') ? 'false' : toggle); }); } toggleAriaExpanded(); if ( document.body.hasAttribute('data-ftrap-listener') ) { return; } document.body.setAttribute('data-ftrap-listener', 'true'); document.addEventListener('ftrap-end', function() { toggleAriaExpanded('false'); }); }
var menuCarets=document.querySelectorAll(".nav-ul li > .wrap > .caret");menuCarets.forEach(function(e){e.addEventListener("keydown",e=>{13===e.keyCode&&(e.target.parentElement.classList.toggle("active"),e.target.getAttribute("aria-pressed")&&e.target.setAttribute("aria-pressed","true"===e.target.getAttribute("aria-pressed")?"false":"true"))}),e.parentElement.parentElement.addEventListener("focusout",t=>{!e.parentElement.parentElement.contains(t.relatedTarget)&&(e.parentElement.classList.remove("active"),e.setAttribute("aria-pressed","false"))})});
function initNoLinkDD() {
var noLinkDDs = document.querySelectorAll(
'.header-menu-sidebar-inner .menu-item-has-children a[href="#"]'
);

if( noLinkDDs.length < 1 ) {
return;
}

noLinkDDs.forEach( function (noLinkDD) {
var dropdownButton = noLinkDD.parentElement.querySelector('button');
noLinkDD.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
e.preventDefault();
dropdownButton.click();
});
});
}
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initNoLinkDD);
//# sourceURL=neve-script-js-after</script> <script id="perfmatters-lazy-load-js-before">window.lazyLoadOptions={elements_selector:"img[data-src],.perfmatters-lazy,.perfmatters-lazy-css-bg",thresholds:"400px 0px",class_loading:"pmloading",class_loaded:"pmloaded",callback_loaded:function(element){if(element.tagName==="IFRAME"){if(element.classList.contains("pmloaded")){if(typeof window.jQuery!="undefined"){if(jQuery.fn.fitVids){jQuery(element).parent().fitVids()}}}}}};window.addEventListener("LazyLoad::Initialized",function(e){var lazyLoadInstance=e.detail.instance;});function perfmattersLazyLoadVideo(e){var t=document.createElement("iframe"),r="ID?";r+=0===e.dataset.query.length?"":e.dataset.query+"&",r+="autoplay=1",t.setAttribute("src",r.replace("ID",e.dataset.src)),e.dataset.referrerpolicy && t.setAttribute("referrerpolicy",e.dataset.referrerpolicy),t.setAttribute("frameborder","0"),t.setAttribute("allowfullscreen","1"),t.setAttribute("allow","accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"),e.replaceChild(t,e.firstChild)};function perfmattersLazyLoadYouTube(e){perfmattersLazyLoadVideo(e)}
//# sourceURL=perfmatters-lazy-load-js-before</script> <script async src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/plugins/perfmatters/js/lazyload.min.js" id="perfmatters-lazy-load-js"></script> <script src="https://windsor.ai/wp-content/themes/neve-child-master/js/script.js" id="script-js" defer></script> <script data-type="vc_custom-js-footer">document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
document.querySelectorAll('.vc_tta-panel a').forEach((panel) => {
panel.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
e.preventDefault();

const parentPanel = this.closest('.vc_tta-panel');
const parentPanelId = parentPanel ? parentPanel.id : null;

let img_url = '';
switch (parentPanelId) {
case 'sign_up':
img_url = '/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/sign-up-with-windsor.png';
break;
case 'select_data':
img_url = '/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/2.jpg.webp';
break;
case 'select_any':
img_url = '/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/3.jpg.webp';
break;
case 'choose_fields':
img_url = '/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/4.jpg.webp';
break;
case 'represent_data':
img_url = '/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/5.jpg.webp';
break;
}

if (img_url) {
const newUrl = img_url;

const slideImg = document.querySelector('#slide_img');
if (slideImg) {
const picture = slideImg.closest('picture');
const source = picture ? picture.querySelector('source') : null;

if (source) {
source.srcset = newUrl;
}

slideImg.src = newUrl;

}
}
});
});
});</script><script></script> <style>/* LOGO CLAUDE */
.claude-banner {
position: fixed;
border: 1px solid rgba(255, 176, 94, 1);
bottom: 20px;
right: 80px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 245, 235, 1) 0%, rgba(255, 221, 179, 1) 50%, rgba(255, 165, 110, 1) 100%);
display: flex;
align-items: center;
border-radius: 60px;
padding: 4px;
box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
z-index: 99999;
transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
overflow: hidden;
height: 58px;
box-sizing: border-box;
}

.claude-banner.collapsed {
width: 105px;
}

.claude-banner:not(.collapsed) {
width: 260px;
}

.banner-body {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
text-decoration: none !important;
flex: 1;
overflow: hidden;
}

.logo-circle {
width: 52px;
height: 52px;
border-radius: 50%;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
flex-shrink: 0;

}

.rotating-logo {
width: 36px;
height: 36px;
animation: rotate-slow 15s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes rotate-slow {
from {
transform: rotate(0deg);
}

to {
transform: rotate(360deg);
}
}

.banner-text {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
margin-left: 3px;
white-space: nowrap;
transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
color: #000;
font-size: 14px;
font-weight: 600;
line-height: 1.2;
}

.collapsed .banner-text {
opacity: 0;
transform: translateX(-10px);
pointer-events: none;
}

.banner-arrow-btn {
background: none;
border: none;
cursor: pointer;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
width: 29px;
height: 29px;
flex-shrink: 0;
color: #000;
transition: transform 0.5s;
padding: 0;
margin-right: 0px;
}

.banner-arrow-btn svg {
width: 20px;
height: 20px;
transform: rotate(180deg);
}

.claude-banner:not(.collapsed) .banner-arrow-btn {
transform: rotate(180deg);
}

.banner-arrow-btn:hover {
background: none;
}</style><div id="claude-banner" class="claude-banner">
<a href="https://onboard.windsor.ai/" class="banner-body" target="_blank"><div class="logo-circle">
<svg class="rotating-logo" width="32" height="32" viewbox="0 0 32 32" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<g clip-path="url(#clip0_9746_28643)">

</button></div> <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
const banner = document.getElementById('claude-banner');

if (toggleBtn && banner) {
toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
e.preventDefault();
e.stopPropagation();
banner.classList.toggle('collapsed');
});
}
